0.q: In extreme alkaliphiles, Na+/H+ antiporters play a central role in the Na+ cycle that supports pH homeostasis, Na+ resistance, solute uptake, and motility.

1.q: AaNhaD-GFP fusion proteins were clearly distributed in the vacuolar membranes... the Na+ fluorescence signal was fairly strong in the vacuoles of the transgenic cells under salinity and alkalinity conditions.

2.q: the ectopic expression of AaNhaD in BY-2 cells promotes the inﬂux of cytosolic Na+ into the vacuoles under salt stress conditions. Thus, AaNhaD appears to function as a tonoplast Na+/H+ antiporter in BY-2 cells.

3.q: the ectopic expression of AaNhaD in BY-2 cells promotes the inﬂux of cytosolic Na+ into the vacuoles under salt stress conditions. Thus, AaNhaD appears to function as a tonoplast Na+/H+ antiporter in BY-2 cells.
